title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Nvidia's Pixel Diffusion (PiD) is a free, open-source AI image model optimized for high-resolution 4K image generation. It integrates with ComfyUI workflows and outperforms alternatives like SeedVR2, using Gemma 2b as a text encoder.
